meaning: n.[解]内淋巴(指在内耳膜状迷路内的淋巴液)
examples: Stria vascularis of the cochlea generates the endocochlear potential( EP) and secretes potassium into endolymph.
It is proved that the endolymph fluid controls the global system response and the utricle controls the final response of the system.
The membranous labyrinth contains a fluid (endolymph) and is lined with hair-like sensors that respond to movement of the fluid.
